description: GWTTKB NFL Team Context — dynasty-relevant depth charts, scheme notes, and analyst commentary 2020-2026. Maintained by GWTTKB. Coach treats this as authoritative.

2020.notes: Hopkins was elite WR1. Murray mobile threat boosted SF value. Drake solid flex. Edmonds efficient receiving back.

2021.notes: Conner surprise breakout. Hopkins still elite. Kirk finally found role. Murray MVP candidate. Edmonds great flex value.

2022.notes: Hopkins suspended 6 games. Hollywood Brown arrived then tore ACL. Murray torn ACL in December. McBride arrived as rookie — watch.

2023.notes: McBride emerged as legit TE1. Murray returned but limited. Hollywood Brown injury-plagued again. Rebuilding.

2024.notes: MHJ arrived — elite rookie WR1 immediately. McBride top 3 TE. Murray healthy. Offense clicked second half.

2025.notes: MHJ ascending. McBride locked in as top TE. Pass-heavy scheme benefits all skill positions here.

2026.notes: Love arrives as 1.03 pick — immediate RB1 candidate. ARI pass-heavy limits RB floor but Love receiving ability fits. MHJ + McBride elite stack.

2020.notes: Ridley emerged as legitimate WR1B. Julio elite but injury concerns. Gurley had knee issues. Gage underrated PPR option.

2021.notes: Ridley suspended 2022. Pitts historic TE rookie. Patterson surprise flex hero. Gage PPR depth.

2022.notes: London solid rookie. Pitts injuries limited him. Bad QB situation killed everyone's value. Allgeier sneaky late.

2023.notes: Bijan arrived — elite dynasty RB1 immediately. London steady. QB situation still awful. Allgeier useful handcuff.

2024.notes: Cousins torn achilles hurt dynasty production. Bijan great. London consistent. Pitts still disappointing.

2025.notes: Penix takes over. Young mobile QB could unlock London and scheme. Bijan elite. Pitts final chance to show value.

2026.notes: Penix-Bijan-London core is interesting. Branch round 3 — speed WR depth. Tuten physical RB2. Pitts contract year.

2020.notes: Andrews elite TE. Lamar SF value enormous. Hollywood Brown boom-bust. Dobbins promising backup. Run heavy scheme.

2021.notes: Andrews 1,361 yards — monster season. Hollywood inconsistent. Dobbins torn ACL preseason. Gus Edwards carried run game.

2022.notes: Hollywood traded to ARI. Bateman underwhelming. Andrews elite again. Dobbins promising but injury-prone. Likely emerging TE2.

2023.notes: Flowers electric rookie. Andrews injury. Lamar MVP. Mitchell electric before ACL. Likely solid TE2 value.

2024.notes: Henry 1,900 yards absurd. Flowers steady. Andrews returned. Lamar MVP again. Likely sneaky TE2 value.

2025.notes: Henry age 35 — dynasty value crashing. Flowers ascending. Andrews declining. Lamar still elite SF value. Likely hold.

2026.notes: Lane arrives round 3 — watch for Flowers target competition. Henry gone. Mitchell bell cow if healthy. Andrews twilight. Likely emerging.

2020.notes: Allen breakout SF monster. Diggs WR1 immediately. Knox emerging. Singletary and Moss split — neither dynasty relevant.

2021.notes: Knox 9 TDs. Diggs elite. Allen top 3 SF. Bills pass heavy — RBs worthless. Beasley PPR depth.

2022.notes: Diggs WR1 level. Davis boom-bust. Knox injuries. Allen still monster. Cook arriving as rookie late.

2023.notes: Cook breakout — 1,100 rush + receiving. Diggs traded mid-season. Allen elite. Shakir sleeper slot WR.

2024.notes: Diggs gone. Cooper solid. Shakir consistent. Cook maintained value. Allen still top SF asset. Coleman developing.

2025.notes: Coleman developing. Shakir reliable slot. Cook good value. Allen locked as SF1 for years. Bell round 4 depth.

2026.notes: Coleman year 2 breakout candidate. Shakir reliable. Allen 30 but still elite. Cook aging but efficient.

2020.notes: Moore emerged as legit WR1. Anderson solid. Samuel PPR depth. Terrible QB suppressed everything.

2021.notes: CMC injury again. Moore great despite bad QB. Anderson traded mid-season. Hubbard solid handcuff.

2022.notes: CMC traded to SF Week 7. Moore still produced. QB carousel. Foreman useful after CMC trade.

2023.notes: Moore traded in Bryce Young deal. Young struggled. Full rebuild. Mingo developmental.

2024.notes: Young benched. Total rebuild. Hubbard fantasy relevant by default. Legette developmental.

2025.notes: McMillan arrives 1.08 — immediate WR1 candidate. Young given another chance. Rebuild mode.

2026.notes: McMillan year 2 — primary target share expected. Brazzell round 3 deep threat. Young make or break. Hubbard serviceable.

2020.notes: Robinson elite despite terrible QB. Montgomery 1,000 yards. Trubisky killed ceiling. Cohen torn ACL.

2021.notes: Fields took over mid-year. Robinson disappointed final season. Mooney quietly solid. Herbert flashed late.

2022.notes: Fields rushing dominance. Montgomery 1,200 rush yards. Mooney disappointing. Run heavy scheme limited WRs.

2023.notes: Moore arrived — finally good WR for Fields. Fields boom-bust. Herbert lightning when healthy. Scott developmental.

2024.notes: Williams rookie struggled with protection. Moore steady. Odunze talented but inconsistent. Swift underused. Allen veteran.

2025.notes: Williams year 2 expected leap. Ben Johnson elite HC/OC. Odunze primary target. Swift receiving back.

2026.notes: Hampton arrives 1.10 — committee likely but talent is there. Ben Johnson scheme should produce. Burden round 2 complements Odunze. Williams ascending.

2020.notes: Burrow torn ACL Week 10. Higgins strong despite QB change. Mixon solid. Boyd reliable PPR depth.

2021.notes: Chase historic rookie. Higgins WR2 level. Burrow elite. Mixon 1,200 yards. Full offense. Boyd PPR depth.

2022.notes: Chase injury midseason. Higgins stepped up. Burrow elite again. Mixon still 1,000 yards. Boyd PPR slot depth.

2023.notes: Burrow torn UCL Week 11. Chase/Higgins both excellent when healthy. Brown promising late. Boyd reliable.

2024.notes: Chase 1,700 yards elite. Higgins contract holdout then traded. Brown breakout RB2/flex. Burrow returned.

2025.notes: Chase locked in as top dynasty WR. Brown proving himself. TE position weak. Burrow healthy again.

2026.notes: Egbuka arrives 1.17 — eventual WR1B next to Chase. Brown established. Young round 4 depth. Burrow-Chase best connection in league.

2020.notes: Chubb elite RB1. Hunt great handcuff. Landry steady. Baker mediocre. Run heavy scheme — Chubb dynasty cornerstone.

2021.notes: OBJ released mid-season. Chubb 1,200 yards. Baker declining. Njoku emerging. Hunt reliable handcuff.

2022.notes: Watson suspended 11 games. Cooper strong when Watson played. Chubb 1,500 yards. Njoku solid. Hunt handcuff value.

2023.notes: Chubb torn ACL Week 2. Watson mediocre. Cooper traded mid-season. Njoku consistent. Ford adequate backup.

2024.notes: Watson torn ACL. Complete rebuild mode. Jeudy arrived but QB situation terrible. Njoku underused.

2025.notes: Sanders 1.02 pick — franchise QB hope. Jeudy primary target. Ford serviceable. Full rebuild.

2026.notes: Concepcion round 1 — Jeudy target competition coming. Denzel Boston round 2. Coleman round 4 RB. Sanders year 2. Dynasty upside here long-term.

2020.notes: Dak torn ACL Week 5. CeeDee Lamb arrived as rookie — electric. Zeke declining. Cooper steady. Schultz emerging.

2021.notes: Lamb ascending. Cooper consistent. Zeke declining. Schultz breakout TE. Dak healthy. Pollard sneaky flex.

2022.notes: Lamb WR1 fully. Cooper traded. Pollard emerged — 1,000 yards. Zeke released after season. Ferguson watch.

2023.notes: Lamb elite WR1 — 1,749 yards. Ferguson breakout TE. Pollard decent. Cooks disappointing.

2024.notes: Dak torn ACL. Lamb elite even with QB issues. Ferguson consistent. Dowdle 1,000 yards by default.

2025.notes: Dak returns. Lamb should bounce back huge. Ferguson reliable. Dowdle RB2 value.

2026.notes: Lamb top 5 dynasty WR. Ferguson fading. Dowdle serviceable. Overton round 4 EDGE but listed here as RB2 for notes — wrong position. Dak healthy — Dallas offense should click.

2020.notes: Jeudy disappointing rookie. Sutton injury early. Lock mediocre. Fant solid but gone after season. Patrick underrated.

2021.notes: Sutton back healthy. Jeudy injuries again. Gordon/Williams committee. Williams promising rookie. Bad QB situation.

2022.notes: Wilson disaster season. Williams torn ACL early. Sutton underused. Jeudy solid despite QB. Dulcich promising.

2023.notes: Wilson benched. Sutton and Jeudy wasted. Williams returned but limited. Sean Payton arrived. Mims flashed.

2024.notes: Nix solid rookie. Sutton finally had QB. Franklin promising. McLaughlin efficient. Payton scheme working.

2025.notes: Nix year 2 leap expected. Sutton dynasty sell-high candidate. Franklin ascending. Harvey dynamic rookie.

2026.notes: Franklin emerging as the guy. Harvey explosive — monitor role. Nix-Franklin connection developing. Coleman round 4. Interesting dynasty stack.

2020.notes: Golladay 1,000 yards then injury. Swift promising rookie. Hockenson solid TE. Marvin Jones consistent.

2021.notes: Stafford traded. ARSB emerged from nowhere. Swift great when healthy. Hockenson traded mid-season.

2022.notes: ARSB 1,161 yards elite slot. Swift 1,000 yards. Goff competent. Lions ascending. Williams 17 TDs as goal line back.

2023.notes: LaPorta elite rookie TE. Montgomery + Gibbs elite RB duo. ARSB consistent. Lions legit contender.

2024.notes: Gibbs 1,000+ every way. Williams breakout. ARSB elite. LaPorta solid. Best offense in NFL.

2025.notes: Gibbs elite dynasty RB. Williams ascending WR2. ARSB still WR1. LaPorta consistent. Stack this offense.

2026.notes: Gibbs + Williams + ARSB all dynasty assets. Law round 5 WR depth. Goff extension signed. Lions window open.

2020.notes: Adams elite WR1. Jones elite RB1. Tonyan 11 TDs. Rodgers MVP. Dillon bruiser backup. Stack this offense.

2021.notes: Adams WR1 all year. Rodgers MVP again. Jones 1,000 yards. MVS boom-bust. Tonyan torn ACL. Dillon goal line.

2022.notes: Adams traded to LV. Rodgers and terrible WRs. Jones still viable. Watson promising late. Doubs sleeper.

2023.notes: Love took over — promising start then injury. Watson injuries. Doubs inconsistent. Jones final year. Reed emerging.

2024.notes: Love solid. Reed consistent slot. Jacobs 1,300 yards. Doubs disappointing. Kraft emerging TE. Musgrave backup.

2025.notes: Reed reliable PPR monster. Love ascending. Jacobs aging. Kraft solid TE2.

2026.notes: Reed dynasty sell candidate — age 27 slot WR. Love not elite enough to push values. Jacobs decline phase. Kraft emerging.

2020.notes: Hopkins traded to ARI. Watson elite despite that. Cooks surprisingly solid. Will Fuller boom-bust before suspension.

2021.notes: Watson suspended. Mills mediocre. Cooks still produced. Collins flashed as rookie. Jordan promising TE.

2022.notes: Pierce 939 yards as rookie. Collins developing. Cooks steady. Full rebuild. Jordan 37 catches.

2023.notes: Stroud elite rookie. Collins WR1 level. Nathaniel Dell emerging late. Pierce fading. Dell dynasty watch.

2024.notes: Collins injured. Diggs arrived. Mixon efficient. Dell promising. Stroud solid. Contender window.

2025.notes: Collins back healthy — WR1. Dell ascending. Mixon aging. Stroud elite. Buy everything in this offense.

2026.notes: Collins dynasty hold. Dell WR2 value. Mixon last season of dynasty relevance. Klein round 2 TE — monitor. Stroud top 5 SF.

2020.notes: JT arrived — incredible rookie. Hilton fading. Rivers managed game. JT dynasty cornerstone. Hines PPR depth.

2021.notes: JT 1,811 yards dominant. Pittman emerged as solid WR. Wentz decent. Hines receiving back value.

2022.notes: JT 1,000 yards despite QB chaos. Pittman consistent. Ryan benched. Pierce developmental.

2023.notes: Richardson electric before injury. JT 1,000 yards. Pittman solid. Downs promising late.

2024.notes: Richardson inconsistent but dynamic. JT fading. Pittman steady. Downs solid slot. Mitchell developing.

2025.notes: Golden arrives 1.14 — big WR with upside. Richardson make-or-break year. Pittman aging. Interesting window.

2026.notes: Golden year 2 — WR1 role expected. Richardson mobility + Golden size = interesting stack. Pittman on way out.

2020.notes: Robinson undrafted gem — 1,070 yards. Chark solid. Minshew fun but limited. Shenault developmental.

2021.notes: Lawrence struggled under Urban Meyer disaster. Robinson torn achilles. Chark solid early. Marvin Jones consistent.

2022.notes: Lawrence breakout. Kirk WR1 level. Engram 73 catches. Etienne 1,000+ yards. Jones and Shenault depth.

2023.notes: Engram 114 catches — elite. Ridley disappointing. Etienne 1,000 yards. Lawrence solid. Bigsby promising.

2024.notes: BTJ electric rookie WR1. Lawrence torn ACL mid-season. Etienne declining. Engram fading.

2025.notes: Coen Air Raid scheme should unleash BTJ. Lawrence returns healthy. Etienne final dynasty season. BTJ buy.

2026.notes: BTJ dynasty WR1 ascending. Smith round 3 — target share battle. Blue dynamic back. Boerkircher round 2 TE. Lawrence healthy.

2020.notes: Kelce still elite. Hill WR1. CEH disappointing. Mahomes elite SF. Stack KC offense. Reid uses TEs.

2021.notes: Kelce 1,125 yards. Hill elite. CEH still disappointing. Mahomes top SF asset. Williams filled in well.

2022.notes: Hill traded. Kelce 1,338 yards monster. JuJu solid. Pacheco emerged late. Mahomes SB MVP.

2023.notes: Rice breakout WR. Kelce declining slightly. Pacheco 1,000 yards. Hardman back. Noah Gray sneaky TE2.

2024.notes: Rice torn ACL. Worthy explosive rookie. Kelce fading fast. Pacheco solid. Mahomes still wins.

2025.notes: Worthy ascending. Kelce retired. Pacheco RB1. Mahomes dynasty value declining with age but still elite SF.

2026.notes: Sadiq round 1 pick — could be Kelce replacement long-term. Worthy WR1 value. Cooper added depth. Mahomes 30 — window tightening. Johnson round 5 RB.

2020.notes: Herbert electric rookie. Ekeler great receiving RB. Allen reliable. Mike Williams boom-bust. Guyton deep threat.

2021.notes: Herbert elite sophomore. Allen healthy 1,000 yards. Williams 1,146 yards. Ekeler top flex. Stack this.

2022.notes: Williams torn ACL Week 1. Allen 1,000 yards. Ekeler still great. Herbert elite. Palmer sleeper.

2023.notes: Keenan and Williams both aging. Ekeler still solid. Herbert mediocre without weapons. Harbaugh coming.

2024.notes: McConkey breakout rookie. Dobbins efficient when healthy. Harbaugh run-first limits passing. Herbert managed.

2025.notes: Henderson arrives — Harbaugh physical RB = could be monster. McConkey dynasty hold. Herbert solid in new system.

2026.notes: Henderson year 2 — Harbaugh loves physical RBs. McConkey reliable. Herbert aging but solid. Thompson round 4.

2020.notes: Akers torn achilles Week 15. Kupp consistent. Woods reliable. Goff managed game well. Higbee steady TE.

2021.notes: Kupp 1,947 yards all-time season. Stafford upgrade massive. Woods torn ACL. Akers returned playoff.

2022.notes: Kupp injury. Stafford injury. Akers never recaptured form. Disaster year. ARob massive disappointment.

2023.notes: Nacua 1,486 yards historic rookie. Williams 1,000 yards. Kupp injured again. Puka dynasty buy.

2024.notes: Nacua WR1 fully. Williams 1,200 yards. Kupp decline phase. Stafford final seasons. McVay system elite.

2025.notes: Nacua and Williams dynasty cornerstones. Kupp dynasty sell. Stafford retirement watch.

2026.notes: Simpson transition year. Judkins arrives round 1. Nacua and Williams strong regardless of QB. Klare TE watch. McVay system insulates all skill positions.

2020.notes: Waller elite TE. Jacobs 1,000 yards. Ruggs promising. Agholor surprisingly efficient. Henry Ruggs boom-bust.

2021.notes: Ruggs killed in DUI accident Week 8. Waller injuries. Jacobs limited use. Carr adequate.

2022.notes: Adams arrived — WR1 production. Jacobs 1,516 yards. Waller traded after season. Renfrow injury.

2023.notes: Adams wasted on bad offense. Jacobs 1,000 yards. QB chaos killed everything. Mayer disappointing rookie.

2024.notes: Bowers 1,194 yards — elite TE2 rookie. Adams traded mid-season. QB still terrible. Total rebuild.

2025.notes: Bowers only dynasty asset worth owning here. O'Connell limits ceiling. Full Pete Carroll rebuild.

2026.notes: Mendoza 1.01 — franchise QB of the future. Bowers-Mendoza connection to develop. Buy Bowers long-term. Thornton deep threat. Monitor Mendoza development.

2020.notes: Tua arrived late. Gaskin efficient. Parker solid. Gesicki receiving TE with no run block. Grant dynamic returner.

2021.notes: Waddle electric rookie. Tua limited. Gesicki 73 catches. McDaniel coming to change everything. Fuller bust.

2022.notes: Hill 1,710 yards. Tua healthy with McDaniel = elite offense. Waddle 1,356 yards. Mostert efficient. Stack.

2023.notes: Achane historic efficiency. Hill 1,799 yards. Tua health concern. Waddle solid. Mostert 800 yards.

2024.notes: Tua concussions again. Hill still produced. Waddle solid. Achane 1,000 yards. Jonnu 67 catches.

2025.notes: Tua health is the question mark over everything. Hill dynasty sell candidate. Achane elite when healthy.

2026.notes: Hill dynasty sell — age 32. Waddle ascending as WR1 if Hill leaves. Achane dynasty hold. Tua always the risk. Douglas round 3 WR developmental.

2020.notes: Jefferson historic rookie. Cook elite dual-threat. Thielen still produced. Smith Jr promising TE backup.

2021.notes: Jefferson 1,616 yards. Cook 1,100 rush + receiving. Cousins efficient. Thielen consistent. KJ Osborn PPR depth.

2022.notes: Jefferson 1,809 yards near-record. Hockenson arrived mid-season via trade. Cook released. Stack.

2023.notes: Jefferson torn ACL Week 1. Addison promising. Hockenson torn ACL. Mattison disappointing. Addison showed out.

2024.notes: Darnold surprise Pro Bowl season. Jefferson elite. Addison solid. Jones 1,000 yards. Hockenson returned.

2025.notes: McCarthy takes over. Jefferson buy before McCarthy connection develops. Addison solid. Jones aging. Felton round 2 sleeper.

2026.notes: Jefferson dynasty cornerstone regardless of QB. McCarthy-Jefferson connection developing. Addison WR2 value. Jones last year. Bredeson round 5 FB.

2020.notes: Covid season. Belichick offense terrible. No dynasty relevant players. White PPR depth.

2021.notes: Mac Jones solid rookie. Harris 1,000 yards. Henry 9 TDs. Meyers reliable. Jonnu Smith disappointment.

2022.notes: Stevenson 1,040 yards. Meyers consistent. Mac Jones regression. Henry reliable. Full rebuild after Belichick.

2023.notes: Complete disaster. Mac benched. No dynasty assets worth owning. Stevenson by default.

2024.notes: Maye arrived late. Stevenson still got work. Vrabel hired. Rebuild foundation set.

2025.notes: Maye full season — top dynasty QB target. Weapons are thin but he elevates everything. Buy Baker as sleeper WR.

2026.notes: Maye dynasty franchise QB — buy now before breakout confirmed. Raridon round 3 TE — Vrabel uses TEs. Baker sleeper WR2 candidate.

2020.notes: Kamara 21 TDs Christmas game record. Thomas injury. Brees final season. Kamara dynasty elite. Cook reliable.

2021.notes: Thomas injury again. Winston 14 TDs before torn ACL. Kamara still reliable. Receiving WRs wasted.

2022.notes: Olave electric rookie. Thomas finally healthy but limited. Kamara solid. Bad QB situation. Shaheed deep threat.

2023.notes: Olave 1,042 yards. Thomas released. Kamara aging. Carr decent upgrade. Olave dynasty WR2. Shaheed speed.

2024.notes: Olave injury. Shaheed dynamic deep threat. Kamara final relevant year. Carr mediocre. Rebuild needed.

2025.notes: Carr cut. Rattler young QB. Olave trade candidate. Shaheed sleeper. Full rebuild mode.

2026.notes: Tyson 1.08 pick — immediate target share in rebuilding offense. Olave trade candidate. Delp round 3 TE. New Orleans dynasty sell most veterans.

2020.notes: Saquon torn ACL Week 2. Without him Giants worthless. Jones mediocre. Engram inconsistent.

2021.notes: Saquon returned but limited. Toney flashed then injuries. Golladay massive disappointment.

2022.notes: Saquon 1,312 yards. Daboll arrival transformed Jones. Robinson promising before ACL. Better vibes.

2023.notes: Jones torn ACL. Waller torn ACL. Saquon carried. Disaster injuries. Slayton steady despite chaos.

2024.notes: Nabers elite rookie despite terrible QB. Jones benched/cut. Nabers dynasty buy low on QB situation.

2025.notes: Wilson bridge. Nabers ascending regardless. Buy before real QB arrives. Robinson sleeper slot.

2026.notes: Nabers is THE dynasty asset here. Wilson declining. NYG likely drafting QB soon. Fields round 3 developmental. Nabers value tied to QB upgrade.

2020.notes: Complete rebuild. No dynasty assets. Tank season. Crowder PPR depth.

2021.notes: Wilson disappointing. Moore flashed before injury. Carter PPR sleeper. Bad team.

2022.notes: G Wilson electric rookie. Breece Hall elite before torn ACL Week 7. Garrett Wilson dynasty hold.

2023.notes: Rodgers torn ACL Week 1. Hall 1,100 yards. G Wilson consistent despite QB carousel. Sad season.

2024.notes: Rodgers full season. Hall disappointment. G Wilson steady. Williams injury again. Mediocre offense.

2025.notes: Rodgers aging. Hall dynasty sell. G Wilson buy if QB situation improves. Corley flashed. Rebuild coming.

2026.notes: Bailey edge rusher at 2 overall — QB depth. Klubnik round 4 QB. Sadiq round 1 TE — if he's the guy, big upside. G Wilson dynasty trade candidate.

2020.notes: Wentz disaster season. Jalen Hurts took over. Sanders solid. Ertz traded. Goedert emerging TE.

2021.notes: Hurts mobile monster. Smith WR1 immediately. Goedert 830 yards. Sanders 1,000 yards. Rising team.

2022.notes: AJ Brown arrived elite. Smith WR1B. Goedert 702 yards. Hurts MVP candidate. Best offense.

2023.notes: AJ Brown 1,456 yards. Smith 1,066 yards. Swift disappointing. Goedert injury. Still top offense.

2024.notes: Saquon 2,005 yards all-time season. AJ Brown injury. Smith elite. Hurts SB MVP. Dynasty gold mine.

2025.notes: Saquon dynasty sell high. AJ Brown health concern. Smith ascending. Hurts injury risk.

2026.notes: Lemon round 1 — target share with Brown/Smith already crowded. Buy Lemon year 2-3. Saquon dynasty decline phase. Goedert final years.

2020.notes: JuJu solid. Diontae 88 catches. Claypool boom-bust. Big Ben declining. Najee Harris coming.

2021.notes: Najee 1,200 yards as rookie. Diontae 107 catches. Freiermuth promising TE. Big Ben final year. JuJu decent.

2022.notes: Najee 1,000 yards. Diontae 86 catches. Claypool traded. Pickett took over late. Pickens emerging.

2023.notes: Pickens emerging. Johnson traded. Najee 1,035 yards. Pickett mediocre. Pickens dynasty buy.

2024.notes: Pickens 1,000+ yards despite QB chaos. Fields dynamic. Najee declining. Freiermuth solid.

2025.notes: Pickens dynasty hold. Wilson bridge QB. Johnson rookie RB. Warren reliable backup.

2026.notes: Bernard round 2 — Steelers traded up. Physical WR2 complement to Pickens. Johnson second year. Pickens value hinges on QB upgrade. Wetjen round 4 WR.

2020.notes: Wilson elite. Metcalf 1,303 yards. Lockett 100 catches. Carson solid. Stack SEA. Olsen solid veteran.

2021.notes: Wilson injury. Carson injury. Metcalf 967 yards. Lockett consistent. Disappointing year. Penny flashed.

2022.notes: Geno surprise Pro Bowl. Metcalf 1,048 yards. Lockett 995 yards. Penny injury again. Fant solid.

2023.notes: Metcalf 1,114 yards. Lockett 894 yards. Charbonnet efficient rookie. Geno adequate. JSN drafted.

2024.notes: JSN disappointing sophomore. Metcalf trade rumors. Charbonnet solid. Macdonald new HC.

2025.notes: JSN WR1 role expected. Metcalf trade candidate. Darnold bridge. Charbonnet dynasty hold.

2026.notes: Price round 1 RB — bell cow opportunity. JSN ascending. Metcalf aging dynasty sell. Bryant round 3.

2020.notes: Kittle 1,000 yards. Aiyuk promising rookie. Mostert injury. Shanahan system elevates everyone. Bourne slot depth.

2021.notes: Deebo 1,405 yards as WR/RB hybrid. Aiyuk 826 yards. Mitchell efficient. Kittle health concern.

2022.notes: CMC arrived Week 7 — immediate RB1. Purdy electric. Aiyuk ascending. Deebo usage changed. Stack everything.

2023.notes: CMC 1,459 yards best RB. Aiyuk 1,342 yards. Purdy elite. Kittle 1,020 yards. SB appearance. Mason sneaky flex.

2024.notes: CMC injury-plagued. Aiyuk contract holdout. Purdy solid. Kittle aging. Deebo declining. Mason stepped up.

2025.notes: Aiyuk trade candidate. Pearsall developing. CMC dynasty sell high. Purdy elite. Kittle final dynasty seasons.

2026.notes: Stribling round 2 — Shanahan WR always produces. Black round 3 — Shanahan system RB. Buy both as sleepers. Aiyuk sell window. CMC retirement watch. Wills round 3 TE.

2020.notes: Brady arrival transformed everything. Evans 1,006 yards. Godwin 840 yards. Gronk 45 catches. Stack TB.

2021.notes: Godwin torn ACL Week 14. Evans 1,035 yards. Fournette 812 rush + 454 rec. Brady elite. SB champs.

2022.notes: Brady retired/unretired. Godwin returning. Evans 1,124 yards. Fournette solid. White emerging late.

2023.notes: Mayfield surprise Pro Bowl. Evans 1,255 yards. Godwin 1,020 yards. White 64 catches. Stack TB again.

2024.notes: Godwin torn achilles again. Evans 1,000 yards again. Irving promising rookie. Mayfield solid.

2025.notes: Evans aging dynasty sell. Irving breakout candidate. McMillan developing. Mayfield consistent.

2026.notes: Evans dynasty sell — age 33. Irving buy low. McMillan emerging. Hurst round 3 WR depth. Bowles defense-first team.

2020.notes: Henry 2,027 yards legendary season. AJ Brown 1,075 yards. Tannehill efficient. Jonnu Smith TE2 value. Dynasty gold.

2021.notes: Henry torn achilles Week 8. AJ Brown 869 yards despite injuries. Julio Jones disappointment.

2022.notes: Henry 1,538 yards. AJ Brown traded to PHI. Burks disappointing. Tannehill mediocre. Full rebuild needed.

2023.notes: Henry 1,167 yards final TEN season. Hopkins solid. Levis took over. Okonkwo 53 catches. Spears promising.

2024.notes: Henry gone. Levis mediocre. Ridley disappointing again. Pollard adequate. Full rebuild.

2025.notes: Ward 1.01 franchise QB. Tate 1.04 elite WR prospect. Henderson physical RB. Buy entire TEN offense.

2026.notes: Ward-Tate connection developing — dynasty stack of the decade if it clicks. Henderson physical fit. Singleton round 5. Buy everything here long-term.

2020.notes: McLaurin elite despite terrible QB. Gibson 795 yards. Thomas 72 catches — sneaky dynasty TE. McKissic PPR.

2021.notes: McLaurin 1,093 yards. Samuel 77 catches. Gibson 1,000 yards. Thomas injury. McKissic 73 catches.

2022.notes: McLaurin wasted again. Robinson 797 yards as rookie. Bad QB situation. Gibson fading.

2023.notes: Howell decent. McLaurin 1,060 yards. Dotson disappointing. Robinson 797 yards. Mediocre.

2024.notes: Daniels electric. McLaurin finally great QB. Noah Brown emerged. Robinson adequate. Luke McCaffrey sleeper.

2025.notes: Daniels-McLaurin dynasty stack. Luke McCaffrey sleeper. Kingsbury Air Raid with Daniels mobility = points.

2026.notes: Williams round 3 WR — Kingsbury Air Raid feeds WRs. McLaurin dynasty sell candidate at 30. Daniels top 5 SF dynasty QB. Buy him.
